lines.text: Full stack developer who genuinely loves the craft.
React and Svelte 5 shape my frontend work.
Node.js, PHP, and Rust cover the backend.
Tauri/Electron let me take things to desktop.
I write functional code and think in systems — SOLID, FSD, hexagonal architecture, DDD guide how I build.
Architecture and design patterns aren't a checkbox for me, they're the fun part.
